critical_issues.title: Key Vault zone-redundancy not guaranteed
critical_issues.details: Location was previously unconstrained, allowing deployment to regions that may not provide zone-redundant Key Vault.

critical_issues.title: Container soft-delete retention not configured
critical_issues.details: Blob service had blob delete retention only; containerDeleteRetentionPolicy was missing.

critical_issues.title: Function host storage identity access incomplete
critical_issues.details: AzureWebJobsStorage identity settings and storage data-plane RBAC assignments were incomplete for allowSharedKeyAccess:false.

suggestions.title: Application Insights sampling should be enabled with effective sampling
suggestions.details: SamplingPercentage was set to 100, which does not effectively reduce telemetry volume.

suggestions.title: Deployment ergonomics for required trapiEndpoint parameter
suggestions.details: trapiEndpoint had no default and could cause deployment failure if omitted.

suggestions.title: Add explicit deployment evidence for az deployment group create
suggestions.details: Template compilation succeeds, but a live deployment execution log is still required to fully evidence acceptance criterion #6.
suggestions.note: Cannot be executed in this environment because Azure login/subscription context is unavailable.
